scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/routes dist/middleware dist/services dist/db && cp routes/package.json dist/routes/package.json && cp middleware/package.json dist/middleware/package.json && cp services/package.json dist/services/package.json && cp db/package.json dist/db/package.json
scripts.migrate:test: NODE_ENV=test node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:latest --env test
scripts.seed:test: NODE_ENV=test node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts seed:run --env test
scripts.db:reset: node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:rollback --all && node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:latest && node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts seed:run
scripts.db:reset-dev: node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:rollback --all --env development && node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:latest --env development && node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts seed:run --env development
scripts.db:reset:test: NODE_ENV=test node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:rollback --all --env test && NODE_ENV=test node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:latest --env test && NODE_ENV=test node scripts/runKnex.mjs --knexfile knexfile.ts seed:run --env test
